data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for background checks, but the evidence does not include any checks or confirmations regarding whether background checks were performed. The linked use case explicitly mentions the need for background checks, yet there is no supporting evidence to confirm that this requirement was met, indicating a clear gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence confirming that background checks were conducted.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
